name: wasmixer-main
description: WASMixer consists of two main functions: the data obfuscator and the code obfuscator. The data obfuscator randomizes readable names and encrypts/decrypts memory areas at runtime. The code obfuscator manipulates instructions and control flow through techniques like alias disruption, control flow flattening, and Collatz-based opaque predicates to thwart human reverse engineering and static analysis.
